profiles.name: DB BR 401 ICE 1
playerChecklist: Verify Sifa and PZB/LZB before departure.
Use cab supervision only when LZB is visibly active.
Follow the vehicle-specific LZB end and intervention recovery procedure.

profiles.name: DB BR 406 ICE 3M
playerChecklist: Check which national safety systems are selected for the route.
Do not assume controls or indications match the BR 403 exactly.
Confirm the active supervision system before relying on cab speed commands.

profiles.name: DB BR 442 Talent 2
playerChecklist: Enable and verify Sifa and PZB during cab setup.
Use the unit-specific PZB controls and indication panel.
Treat route and formation variants as separate validation targets.

profiles.name: DB BR 612
playerChecklist: Confirm whether GNT is enabled and available on the current route section.
Do not treat physical tilt alone as permission to exceed conventional speeds.
Continue to obey PZB and lineside signalling unless cab supervision explicitly applies.

publicationRule: Profiles remain unpublished or visibly provisional until exact controls and at least one route use are evidenced.
